title: Thugz VS Zombies
description:
The Undead Are Taking Over Tha Block

The neighborhood is under attack, and the only thing standing between the Zombies and your Home is a crew of wild, specialized THUGZ.

Thugz VS Zombies is a cartoon row-defense action strategy game where you place defenders, build cash, unlock new characters, upgrade your squad, and survive increasingly ridiculous zombie waves. Every stage introduces new threats, new tactics, and a boss fight with its own personality.

Build Your Crew

Choose from a roster of unique THUGZ, each with their own role:

• Ranged attackers who blast Zombies from across the block

• Melee bruisers who charge forward and scrap face-to-face

• Defenders who hold the line when things get ugly

• Passive support THUGZ who generate cash or help your crew stay alive

• Special units with turrets, fire, shotguns, buffs, and more

Earn cash during each wave, buy more plots, replace old placements, and upgrade your favorite THUGZ to hit harder, survive longer, and fire faster.

Fight Bigger, Weirder Bosses

Every stage builds toward a boss battle. These are not just bigger Zombies with bigger health bars. Bosses move differently, summon helpers, launch special attacks, stun, rush, retreat, and force you to change your strategy.

Survive Earl the Bowler, Badder Bunny, Dead Weed, the Z-Triplets, and the final nightmare herself: MomZom.

Use Special Abilities

Some Zombies drop special abilities that can turn a bad wave around:

• Drive By - call in a car that rolls through and fires into the Zombie field

• Freeze Friends - slow the entire Zombie side with icy backup

• Cash Heist - drop a huge cash bonus when you need it most

Store abilities, spend them at the right moment, and keep the block alive.

Play Solo or Local Co-Op

Play through the campaign alone or team up in local co-op. In co-op, both players defend one larger Home with separate cash pools, separate plots, and shared pressure. Communicate, share cash, and hold both sides of the block together.

{Local Co-Op requires a connected gamepad for the 2nd player)

Fight a Friend in Local Versus Mode 

Your friend thinks he can manage a crew better! Prove it! Gather your THUGZ and go one-one VS a friend in local Versus in split-screen mode! Protect your Turf while demolishing there's.

{Local Versus requires a connected gamepad for the 2nd player)

Replay, Upgrade, Survive

Cleared stages can be replayed to earn better scores, experiment with different THUGZ, and prepare for harder fights. Choose your difficulty, build your strategy, and see how long your crew can keep the neighborhood standing.
description_short: Thugz VS Zombies is a row-defense action strategy game where a neighborhood crew protects the block from zombie waves, wild bosses, and chaos. Place THUGZ, earn cash, upgrade your squad, trigger power-ups, and survive solo or with a local co-op partner.
